programs.title: Lakefront Luxury
programs.desc: Dennis and Melanie hunt for a lake house that can serve as both their home and workspace; Melanie is looking for a space that can accommodate her dance business, while Dennis wants the perfect man cave.

programs.title: Lakefront Luxury
programs.desc: Jordan and Aurelio search for a home that can accommodate their growing family in the future; they have a few big-ticket items on their wish list, including a gourmet kitchen, home office, dedicated children's room and a gym.

programs.title: Lakefront Luxury
programs.desc: Looking for harmony with Krystal and Josh, two music producers in search of a peaceful place to compose and raise their child; checking out an island retreat, a sleek, terraced beachside property and a timber-ceiling home with a unique wine feature.

programs.title: Lakefront Luxury
programs.desc: Taking stock with recent retirees Irv and Sheryl, who want a well-appointed, grandkid-friendly hideaway; exploring a magnificent home with a gourmet kitchen, a peninsula property with killer views, and a modern custom build on multiple tiers of land.

programs.title: Lakefront Luxury
programs.desc: June and Patrick, along with their large and active blended family, are on the lookout for their dream lake house.

programs.title: Restored
programs.desc: The owners want to pass a landmark home along to their daughters but they want to bring back any Victorian style that has been lost, re-imagine the small kitchen and add modern conveniences; Brett needs to determine the original color scheme.
